use_cases: Create an interactive decorative background for hero sections on landing pages
Add a visually engaging grid element to product showcases or feature highlights
Implement an interactive loading or empty state with visual feedback
Use as a decorative accent element in SaaS marketing pages
Create interactive visual dividers or section separators
ai_summary: RippleGrid is an interactive visual component that renders a configurable grid of cells with a cascading pulse animation effect. When a user clicks any cell, a ripple of pulsing animations spreads outward to surrounding cells based on Manhattan distance. The component is fully customizable through props for size, colors, cell dimensions, and animation timing, making it suitable for decorative backgrounds, interactive landing page elements, or visual accent components in SaaS and dev-tool interfaces.
